notes: Covers all non-Done, non-Cancelled, non-Deferred open issues across all states. 'Open' = statusType backlog or unstarted that are not future-stage-gated frozen dormant; plus started/blocked issues that are active work items.

duplicate_groups.reason: UTV2-1301 (Constitution Gap Audit v3 — post-ingestion incident production-readiness) and UTV2-1302 (Production Readiness Audit v3 — post-ingestion recovery launch blocker) are both Done and both represent the same v3 readiness audit effort triggered by the same incident. Both are closed; no action needed, but these should not be re-opened as separate lanes.

UTV2-1264 (Extend CLV resolution to game totals) and UTV2-1265 (Extend CLV resolution to spread bets) are independent market-type extensions but share the same CLV resolution infrastructure pattern. They are NOT duplicates — they target different bet types — but should be dispatched sequentially (1264 first as higher priority) to avoid merge conflicts in the CLV resolver.

UTV2-1042 (Syndicate-ready edge certification), UTV2-1033 (STRONG label proof run), and UTV2-1250 (Monitor settled CLV-path sample) all gate on the same real-money edge data accumulation. UTV2-1042 is the canonical blocking gate; UTV2-1033 and UTV2-1250 are dependent monitors. None are duplicates per se, but they are a tight dependency chain that should not be dispatched independently.
